response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on geospatial applications (e.g., GISCollective), which aligns partially with the routing tiling role. However, his recent work lacks direct experience with C++/Rust or large-scale geospatial data pipelines for navigation systems, which are critical for this position.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and open-source contributions, showing familiarity with geospatial challenges.
Proven track record in building scalable systems (e.g., Optilyz, Sociomantic) and optimizing performance for high-throughput applications.
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn new technologies, as evidenced by his diverse tech stack and workshops.
concerns: Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, with no explicit mention of modern C++ or Rust experience in recent roles.
Lacks direct experience with routing data pipelines or navigation systems, which are core to the role.
Most recent work (re:cinq) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure and full-stack development, diverging from the specialized geospatial/navigation domain.
